title: GitHub - aibuildai/AI-Build-AI: AIBuildAI Inc
excerpt: AIBuildAI Inc . Contribute to aibuildai/AI-Build-AI development by creating an account on GitHub.
content_html:
AIBuildAI – An AI agent that automatically builds AI models

🏆 #1 on OpenAI MLE-Bench

News

  • [6/17/2026] The AIBuildAI Agent 2.5 version is made available to Max users: a live build dashboard, run replay, cross-run memory, MCP research tools, and DeepSeek support. Release notes and download.
  • [5/26/2026] The AIBuildAI Agent 2.0 version is made available to Pro users.
  • [5/1/2026] In the TGS Salt Identification Challenge hosted by Kaggle, the model automatically developed by our AIBuildAI Agent ranked in the top 5.7%. Among 3,219 teams composed of human experts, this performance reaches the level of top-tier human AI experts. Model and code developed by the Agent: tasks/tgs-salt-identification-challenge.
  • [4/27/2026] Excited to announce AIBuildAI Agent 2.0! It has once again achieved #1 on OpenAI's MLE-Bench, reaching a score of 70.7% and substantially outperforming the agents ranked 2nd through 5th. Compared to version 1.0, Agent 2.0 introduces several technical advancements, which we will detail in an upcoming technical report. The 2.0 version will be available to Pro users soon.
  • [4/24/2026] In a heart disease prediction competition hosted by Kaggle, the model automatically developed by our AIBuildAI Agent ranked in the top 6.6%. Among 4,370 teams composed of human experts, this performance reaches the level of top-tier human AI experts. Model and code developed by the agent: tasks/playground-series-s6e2.
demo.mp4

Introduction

AIBuildAI is an AI agent that automatically builds AI models. Given a task, it runs an agent loop that analyzes the problem, designs models, writes code to implement them, trains them, tunes hyperparameters, evaluates model performance, and iteratively improves the models. By automating the model development workflow, AIBuildAI reduces much of the manual effort required to build AI models.

Current Results

On OpenAI MLE-Bench, AIBuildAI ranked #1, demonstrating strong performance on real-world AI model building tasks.

Quick Start

AIBuildAI requires a Linux x86_64 machine (Ubuntu 20.04 or newer).

There are three versions. V2.5 (Max) is the current, most capable version. V2 (Pro) and V1 (free) remain available.

Version Plan To run it
V2.5 (Max) — current Max subscription aibuildai login (Max plan) + a Claude Code login or model API key
V2 (Pro) Pro subscription aibuildai login (Pro plan) + a Claude Code login or Anthropic API key
V1 free a Claude Code login or Anthropic API key (no account)

Subscriptions are managed at accounts.aibuildai.io; see the account page for the available plans.

V2.5 (Max) — current

  1. Subscribe. Create an account at accounts.aibuildai.io/sign-up and switch to the Max plan.

  2. Install.

    curl -fsSL https://github.com/aibuildai/AI-Build-AI/releases/download/v2.5-latest/aibuildai-linux-x86_64.tar.gz | tar xz && ./aibuildai-linux-x86_64-*/install.sh

  3. Log in (required before running):

    aibuildai login      # opens a browser to sign in
aibuildai whoami     # should show an active Max plan

  4. Sign in to Claude Code or set your API key.

    If Claude Code is already signed in on this machine, no Anthropic API key is needed. AIBuildAI automatically uses the local Claude Code credentials.

    If Claude Code is not signed in, run:

    claude auth login

    You can also use an Anthropic API key instead:

    export AIBUILDAI_API_KEY=your-anthropic-api-key

    To use DeepSeek, set a deepseek-* model in the config and put your DeepSeek API key in AIBUILDAI_API_KEY.

  5. Run. V2.5 is driven by a YAML config:

    aibuildai config > task.yaml    # writes a starter config with every field
# edit task.yaml: set run.task_name, run.data_root, run.instruction, run.playground_root
aibuildai run task.yaml

    Other commands: aibuildai memorize (summarize past runs into memory), aibuildai replay <run-dir> (replay a finished run), aibuildai --help.

V2 (Pro)

  1. Subscribe to the Pro plan at accounts.aibuildai.io/sign-up.

  2. Install.

    curl -fsSL https://github.com/aibuildai/AI-Build-AI/releases/download/v2.0-latest/aibuildai-linux-x86_64.tar.gz | tar xz && ./aibuildai-linux-x86_64-*/install.sh

  3. Log in.

    aibuildai login
aibuildai whoami     # should show an active Pro plan

  4. Sign in to Claude Code or set your API key.

    If Claude Code is already signed in on this machine, no Anthropic API key is needed. AIBuildAI automatically uses the local Claude Code credentials.

    If Claude Code is not signed in, run:

    claude auth login

    You can also use an Anthropic API key instead:

    export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=your-api-key

  5. Run. V2 is driven by command-line flags:

    aibuildai run --task-name <name> --data-dir <path> \
  --playground-dir <path> --instruction "$(cat task.md)" --no-form

    Or run aibuildai with no flags to fill in the parameters in an interactive form.

V1 (free)

No account or subscription required.

  1. Install.

    curl -fsSL https://github.com/aibuildai/AI-Build-AI/releases/download/v1.0-latest/aibuildai-linux-x86_64.tar.gz | tar xz && ./aibuildai-linux-x86_64-*/install.sh

  2. Sign in to Claude Code or set your API key.

    If Claude Code is already signed in on this machine, no Anthropic API key is needed. AIBuildAI automatically uses the local Claude Code credentials.

    If Claude Code is not signed in, run:

    claude auth login

    You can also use an Anthropic API key instead:

    export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=your-api-key

  3. Run with command-line flags:

    aibuildai --task-name <name> --data-dir <path> \
  --playground-dir <path> --instruction "$(cat task.md)" --no-form

    Or run aibuildai with no flags to fill in the parameters in an interactive form.

Important: run the command directly in your terminal. Do not wrap it in a .sh/.bash script — running it through a script may cause the TUI (Text User Interface) to crash.

Results

After a run completes, the output directory usually looks like (structure may slightly vary by task):

├── candidate_1/  candidate_2/  candidate_3/  # Auto-generated training scripts and model checkpoints
├── checkpoint.pth       # Best model checkpoint
├── inference.py         # Standalone inference script for the final model
├── submission.csv       # Test predictions (if test inputs are provided)
└── progress.pdf         # Visual progress report

The main outputs of an AIBuildAI run are the model checkpoints and the script inference.py, which runs predictions with the final model on any data. When the task data folder includes unlabeled test inputs, AIBuildAI also writes a predicted-label file submission.csv.

Tasks

We provide ready-to-run task markdowns and datasets in the tasks/ folder of this repository. You can also write your own task description and point the run at your own dataset.

git clone https://github.com/aibuildai/AI-Build-AI.git

License

This project is licensed under the MIT License - see the LICENSE file for details.

Citation

@article{zhang2026aibuildai,
    title={AIBuildAI: An AI Agent for Automatically Building AI Models},
    author={Ruiyi Zhang and Peijia Qin and Qi Cao and Li Zhang and Pengtao Xie},
    year={2026},
    journal={arXiv},
    url={https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14455}
}
@article{zhang2026aibuildai2,
    title={AIBuildAI-2: A Knowledge-Enhanced Agent for Automatically Building AI Models},
    author={Ruiyi Zhang and Peijia Qin and Qi Cao and Li Zhang and Pengtao Xie},
    year={2026},
    journal={arXiv},
    url={https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27873}
}

Among 3,219 teams composed of human experts, this performance reaches the level of top-tier human AI experts. Model and code developed by the Agent: tasks/tgs-salt-identification-challenge.

sentences.en: [5/1/2026] In the TGS Salt Identification Challenge hosted by Kaggle, the model automatically developed by our AIBuildAI Agent ranked in the top 5.7%.
sentences.zh: [5/1/2026] 在Kaggle主办的TGS盐识别挑战赛中，我们的AIBuildAI Agent自动开发的模型排名前5.7%。

sentences.en: Among 3,219 teams composed of human experts, this performance reaches the level of top-tier human AI experts.
sentences.zh: 在由人类专家组成的3219支团队中，这一表现达到了顶级人类人工智能专家的水平。

sentences.en: Model and code developed by the Agent: tasks/tgs-salt-identification-challenge.
sentences.zh: Agent开发的模型和代码：tasks/tgs-salt-identification-challenge。

blocks.html_en: • [4/27/2026] Excited to announce AIBuildAI Agent 2.0! It has once again achieved #1 on OpenAI's MLE-Bench, reaching a score of 70.7% and substantially outperforming the agents ranked 2nd through 5th. Compared to version 1.0, Agent 2.0 introduces several technical advancements, which we will detail in an upcoming technical report. The 2.0 version will be available to Pro users soon.

sentences.en: [4/27/2026] Excited to announce AIBuildAI Agent 2.0!
sentences.zh: [4/27/2026] 很高兴宣布 AIBuildAI Agent 2.0！

sentences.en: It has once again achieved #1 on OpenAI's MLE-Bench, reaching a score of 70.7% and substantially outperforming the agents ranked 2nd through 5th.
sentences.zh: 它在 OpenAI 的 MLE-Bench 上再次排名第一，得分达到 70.7%，大大超过了排名第二至第五的智能体。

sentences.en: Compared to version 1.0, Agent 2.0 introduces several technical advancements, which we will detail in an upcoming technical report.
sentences.zh: 与 1.0 版本相比，Agent 2.0 引入了多项技术进步，我们将在即将发布的技术报告中详细介绍。

sentences.en: The 2.0 version will be available to Pro users soon.
sentences.zh: 2.0版本很快就会向Pro用户开放。

blocks.html_en: • [4/24/2026] In a heart disease prediction competition hosted by Kaggle, the model automatically developed by our AIBuildAI Agent ranked in the top 6.6%. Among 4,370 teams composed of human experts, this performance reaches the level of top-tier human AI experts. Model and code developed by the agent: tasks/playground-series-s6e2.

sentences.en: Among 4,370 teams composed of human experts, this performance reaches the level of top-tier human AI experts.
sentences.zh: 在4370名人类专家组成的团队中，这一表现达到了顶级人类人工智能专家的水平。

sentences.en: Model and code developed by the agent: tasks/playground-series-s6e2.
sentences.zh: 代理开发的模型和代码：tasks/playground-series-s6e2。

blocks.html_en:
• Sign in to Claude Code or set your API key.

    If Claude Code is already signed in on this machine, no Anthropic API key is needed. AIBuildAI automatically uses the local Claude Code credentials.

    If Claude Code is not signed in, run:

    claude auth login

    You can also use an Anthropic API key instead:

    export AIBUILDAI_API_KEY=your-anthropic-api-key

    To use DeepSeek, set a deepseek-* model in the config and put your DeepSeek API key in AIBUILDAI_API_KEY.

blocks.html_en:
• Run. V2.5 is driven by a YAML config:

    aibuildai config > task.yaml    # writes a starter config with every field
# edit task.yaml: set run.task_name, run.data_root, run.instruction, run.playground_root
aibuildai run task.yaml

    Other commands: aibuildai memorize (summarize past runs into memory), aibuildai replay <run-dir> (replay a finished run), aibuildai --help.

sentences.en: Run.
sentences.zh: 跑步。

sentences.en: V2.5 is driven by a YAML config: aibuildai config > task.yaml # writes a starter config with every field # edit task.yaml: set run.task_name, run.data_root, run.instruction, run.playground_root aibuildai run task.yaml Other commands: aibuildai memorize (summarize past runs into memory), aibuildai replay <run-dir> (replay a finished run), aibuildai --help.
sentences.zh: V2.5 由 YAML 配置驱动： aibuildai config > task.yaml # writes a starter config with every field # edit task.yaml: set run.task_name, run.data_root, run.instruction, run.playground_root aibuildai run task.yaml 其他命令：aibuildai memorize（将过去的运行总结到内存中），aibuildai replay <run-dir>（重播已完成的运行）， aibuildai——帮助。

• Install.

    curl -fsSL https://github.com/aibuildai/AI-Build-AI/releases/download/v2.0-latest/aibuildai-linux-x86_64.tar.gz | tar xz && ./aibuildai-linux-x86_64-*/install.sh

    If Claude Code is not signed in, run:

    claude auth login

    You can also use an Anthropic API key instead:

    export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=your-api-key

• Run. V2 is driven by command-line flags:

    aibuildai run --task-name <name> --data-dir <path> \
  --playground-dir <path> --instruction "$(cat task.md)" --no-form

    Or run aibuildai with no flags to fill in the parameters in an interactive form.

blocks.html_en: Important: run the command directly in your terminal. Do not wrap it in a .sh/.bash script — running it through a script may cause the TUI (Text User Interface) to crash.

sentences.en: Results

blocks.html_en: After a run completes, the output directory usually looks like (structure may slightly vary by task):

sentences.en: After a run completes, the output directory usually looks like (structure may slightly vary by task):
sentences.zh: 运行完成后，输出目录通常如下所示（结构可能因任务而略有不同）：

blocks.html_en: The main outputs of an AIBuildAI run are the model checkpoints and the script inference.py, which runs predictions with the final model on any data. When the task data folder includes unlabeled test inputs, AIBuildAI also writes a predicted-label file submission.csv.

sentences.en: The main outputs of an AIBuildAI run are the model checkpoints and the script inference.py, which runs predictions with the final model on any data.
sentences.zh: AIBuildAI 运行的主要输出是模型检查点和脚本 inference.py，该脚本对任何数据运行最终模型的预测。

sentences.en: When the task data folder includes unlabeled test inputs, AIBuildAI also writes a predicted-label file submission.csv.
sentences.zh: 当任务数据文件夹包含未标记的测试输入时，AIBuildAI 还会写入预测标签文件submission.csv。

blocks.html_en: Tasks
We provide ready-to-run task markdowns and datasets in the tasks/ folder of this repository. You can also write your own task description and point the run at your own dataset.

sentences.en: We provide ready-to-run task markdowns and datasets in the tasks/ folder of this repository.
sentences.zh: 我们在此存储库的tasks/文件夹中提供了可立即运行的任务降价和数据集。

sentences.en: You can also write your own task description and point the run at your own dataset.
sentences.zh: 您还可以编写自己的任务描述并将运行指向您自己的数据集。

blocks.html_en: Citation

sentences.en: Citation
sentences.zh: 引文

content_html_zh:
AIBuildAI – 自动构建人工智能模型的人工智能代理

🏆 OpenAI MLE-Bench 上排名#1

News

  • [6/17/2026] AIBuildAI Agent 2.5 版本可供 Max 用户使用：实时构建仪表板、运行回放、交叉运行内存、MCP 研究工具和 DeepSeek 支持。 发行说明和下载。
  • [5/26/2026] AIBuildAI Agent 2.0版本可供Pro用户使用。
  • [5/1/2026] 在Kaggle主办的TGS盐识别挑战赛中，我们的AIBuildAI Agent自动开发的模型排名前5.7%。 在由人类专家组成的3219支团队中，这一表现达到了顶级人类人工智能专家的水平。 Agent开发的模型和代码：tasks/tgs-salt-identification-challenge。
  • [4/27/2026] 很高兴宣布 AIBuildAI Agent 2.0！ 它在 OpenAI 的 MLE-Bench 上再次排名第一，得分达到 70.7%，大大超过了排名第二至第五的智能体。 与 1.0 版本相比，Agent 2.0 引入了多项技术进步，我们将在即将发布的技术报告中详细介绍。 2.0版本很快就会向Pro用户开放。
  • [4/24/2026] 在 Kaggle 主办的心脏病预测竞赛中，我们的 AIBuildAI Agent 自动开发的模型排名前 6.6%。 在4370名人类专家组成的团队中，这一表现达到了顶级人类人工智能专家的水平。 代理开发的模型和代码：tasks/playground-series-s6e2。
demo.mp4

介绍

AIBuildAI是一个自动构建AI模型的AI代理。 给定一个任务，它运行一个代理循环来分析问题、设计模型、编写代码来实现它们、训练它们、调整超参数、评估模型性能并迭代改进模型。 通过自动化模型开发工作流程，AIBuildAI 减少了构建 AI 模型所需的大量手动工作。

当前结果

在 OpenAI MLE-Bench 上，AIBuildAI 排名第一，在现实世界的 AI 模型构建任务中展示了强大的性能。

快速入门

AIBuildAI 需要 Linux x86_64 计算机（Ubuntu 20.04 或更高版本）。

有三个版本。 V2.5（Max）是当前功能最强大的版本。 V2（专业版）和 V1（免费）仍然可用。

版本 Plan 运行它
V2.5（最大）— 当前 最大订阅数 aibuildai 登录名（Max 计划）+ Claude 代码登录名或模型 API 密钥
V2 (Pro) 专业版订阅 aibuildai 登录（专业版）+ Claude Code 登录或 Anthropic API 密钥
V1 free Claude Code 登录名或 Anthropic API 密钥（无帐户）

订阅在accounts.aibuildai.io 上进行管理；请参阅帐户页面了解可用计划。

V2.5（最大）— 当前

  1. 订阅。 在accounts.aibuildai.io/sign-up 创建帐户并切换到Max 套餐。
  2. 安装。 卷曲-fsSL https://github.com/aibuildai/AI-Build-AI/releases/download/v2.5-latest/aibuildai-linux-x86_64.tar.gz | tar xz && ./aibuildai-linux-x86_64-*/install.sh
  3. 登录（运行前需要）： aibuildai login # 打开浏览器登录 aibuildai whoami # 应显示活动的 Max 计划
  4. 登录 Claude Code 或设置您的 API 密钥。 如果 Claude Code 已在此计算机上登录，则不需要 Anthropic API 密钥。 AIBuildAI 自动使用本地 Claude Code 凭据。 如果 Claude Code 未登录，请运行： claude auth login 您还可以使用 Anthropic API 密钥：export AIBUILDAI_API_KEY=your-anthropic-api-key 要使用 DeepSeek，请在配置中设置 deepseek-* 模型，并将 DeepSeek API 密钥放入 AIBUILDAI_API_KEY 中。
  5. 跑步。 V2.5 由 YAML 配置驱动： aibuildai config > task.yaml # writes a starter config with every field # edit task.yaml: set run.task_name, run.data_root, run.instruction, run.playground_root aibuildai run task.yaml 其他命令：aibuildai memorize（将过去的运行总结到内存中），aibuildai replay <run-dir>（重播已完成的运行）， aibuildai——帮助。

V2 (Pro)

  1. 请访问accounts.aibuildai.io/sign-up 订阅Pro 计划。
  2. 安装。 卷曲-fsSL https://github.com/aibuildai/AI-Build-AI/releases/download/v2.0-latest/aibuildai-linux-x86_64.tar.gz | tar xz && ./aibuildai-linux-x86_64-*/install.sh
  3. 登录。 aibuildai 登录 aibuildai whoami # 应显示有效的 Pro 计划
  4. 登录 Claude Code 或设置您的 API 密钥。 如果 Claude Code 已在此计算机上登录，则不需要 Anthropic API 密钥。 AIBuildAI 自动使用本地 Claude Code 凭据。 如果 Claude Code 未登录，请运行：claude auth login 您还可以使用 Anthropic API 密钥：export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=your-api-key
  5. 跑步。 V2 由命令行标志驱动： aibuildai run --task-name <name> --data-dir <path> \ --playground-dir <path> --instruction "$(cat task.md)" --no-form 或者运行不带标志的 aibuildai 以交互式形式填写参数。

V1 (free)

无需帐户或订阅。

  1. 安装。 卷曲-fsSL https://github.com/aibuildai/AI-Build-AI/releases/download/v1.0-latest/aibuildai-linux-x86_64.tar.gz | tar xz && ./aibuildai-linux-x86_64-*/install.sh
  2. 登录 Claude Code 或设置您的 API 密钥。 如果 Claude Code 已在此计算机上登录，则不需要 Anthropic API 密钥。 AIBuildAI 自动使用本地 Claude Code 凭据。 如果 Claude Code 未登录，请运行：claude auth login 您还可以使用 Anthropic API 密钥：export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=your-api-key
  3. 使用命令行标志运行： aibuildai --task-name <name> --data-dir <path> \ --playground-dir <path> --instruction "$(cat task.md)" --no-form 或者运行不带标志的 aibuildai 以在交互式表单中填写参数。

重要提示：直接在终端中运行该命令。 不要将其包装在 .sh/.bash 脚本中 - 通过脚本运行它可能会导致 TUI（文本用户界面）崩溃。

结果

运行完成后，输出目录通常如下所示（结构可能因任务而略有不同）：

├── candidate_1/  candidate_2/  candidate_3/  # Auto-generated training scripts and model checkpoints
├── checkpoint.pth       # Best model checkpoint
├── inference.py         # Standalone inference script for the final model
├── submission.csv       # Test predictions (if test inputs are provided)
└── progress.pdf         # Visual progress report

AIBuildAI 运行的主要输出是模型检查点和脚本 inference.py，该脚本对任何数据运行最终模型的预测。 当任务数据文件夹包含未标记的测试输入时，AIBuildAI 还会写入预测标签文件submission.csv。

Tasks

我们在此存储库的tasks/文件夹中提供了可立即运行的任务降价和数据集。 您还可以编写自己的任务描述并将运行指向您自己的数据集。

git clone https://github.com/aibuildai/AI-Build-AI.git

执照
